'''patïfwïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrocement|fibrocement]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrocement|fibrocement]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| patïfwïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pætïfwïfth || pætïfwïfj || pætïfwïfsh || pætïfwïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || patïftïfwïfth || patïftïfwïfj || patïftïfwïfsh || patïftïfwïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || patïfwïfth || patïfwïfj || patïfwïfsh || patïfwïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || patïffwïffth || patïffwïffj || patïffwïffsh || patïffwïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || patïfwïfïf || patïfwïfïf || patïfwïfïf || patïfwïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || patïfwïfth || patïfwïfj || patïfwïfsh || patïfwïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || patïfwïfïfl || patïfwïfïfl || patïfwïfïfl || patïfwïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || patïfwïfïfïf || patïfwïfïfïf || patïfwïfïfïf || patïfwïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || patïfwïfïfn || patïfwïfïfn || patïfwïfïfn || patïfwïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || patïfwïfïforo || patïfwïfïforo || patïfwïfïforo || patïfwïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
